zh.lifeSummary: Gilbert Gand是Robert de Gand和Alicia Paynel的兒子，出生。他與Alice d'Aubigny結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1242年1月22日之前在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾福爾金哈姆 煙雨 勞頓。

nameMeanings.name: Gand
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Basque: topographic name derived from (a variant of) gain ‘peak, summit’ + the definite article -a.
Hispanic (Philippines): nickname from Spanish gana ‘appetite; enthusiasm’, a word borrowed into various languages of the Philippines.

variants.name: Ganapathy
meanings: Indian: from a personal name from Hindi and Sanskrit ganapati, one of the names of the elephant god Ganesh, meaning ‘lord of the masses’.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: Gilbert Gand was born as the son of Robert de Gand and Alicia Paynel. He married Alice d'Aubigny. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died before 22 January 1242, in Folkingham with Laughton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert GandはRobert de GandとAlicia Paynelの息子として生まれた。Alice d'Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1242年1月22日以前にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアフォルキンガム ウィス ラウトンで死去した。

ko.Folkingham, Bourne, Lincolnshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함 위스 로그h턴
ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Gand(은)는 Robert de Gand(와)과 Alicia Paynel의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Alice d'Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 1월 22일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 폴킨그함 위스 로그h턴에서 사망했다.
